title: 冒険家ゴールドシップ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking along the riverside, a canoe stops
at the bank and an Umamusume hops off.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
At long last! Land ho! Hail, yon traveler! Riddle
me this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What does one need to survive upon these
yet-to-be-traversed lands?! Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence! I was thinking the same
thing!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Righty-o! To commemorate this occasion, I'll
teach you the secret to building stamina! You
wanna hear it?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The secret is... finding it yourself! Otherwise this
whole charade is meaningless!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Remember—one must always have an
adventurous heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that cryptic exclamation, Gold Ship returns
to her canoe and paddles down the river...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, it's important to stick to your guns if you
want any hope of surviving in a harsh
environment!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And if it's sticky things you want, well, what's
stickier than natto?! In other words, if you eat
natto...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You'll stick to your guns like none
other and will never give up!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
By the way, natto tastes way better and fluffier if
you mix it up first before adding soy sauce! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that cryptic exclamation, Gold Ship returns
to her canoe and paddles down the river...
